strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TDD, pairing, and CI/CD practices from RIDE Capital and workshop teaching
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java mentioned but not as primary stack
React experience present but not deeply highlighted relative to backend/DLang work

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js
AI agent and MCP development experience

response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack expertise across the required TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP experience matching a key requirement. Strong engineering culture fit (TDD, code reviews, workshops). Gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin are notable but learnable given the broad polyglot background and demonstrated ability to pick the right tool for the job.
